title: Look Back On Time With Kindly Eyes,
content:
Look back on time with kindly eyes,
    He doubtless did his best;
    How softly sinks his trembling sun
    In human nature's west!
meaning:
"Look Back On Time With Kindly Eyes," is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
